ordered_steps.name: Load approved interaction closure review, closure artifacts, and blocked closure units
ordered_steps.required_input: P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review decision and closure handoff

ordered_steps.name: Load source and distillation semantics as the primary meaning rail
Create atomic explicit element inventory from source, distillation, and eligible closure objects
Create adoption decisions for every explicit inventory row
Use deductive completion for required same-task missing elements only
Create input obligations and product expansion gaps for unresolved acquisition or scope choices
Route missing child pages, lower-level surfaces, and ambiguous page structure through structural completion review
Record inference evidence for every canonical, blocked, and rejected derived conclusion
Validate coverage, row atomicity, no product expansion, and downstream handoff readiness

element_rules: Natural language and approved review decisions are the primary semantic authority; inventory rows are index and verification skeleton only.
Every inventory row must be atomic and describe exactly one element.
Every explicit inventory row must have exactly one adoption decision.
Canonical projection includes only ADOPT_AS_IS, ADOPT_NORMALIZED, eligible DEDUCTIVE_PRIMARY derived rows, and Human Gate resolved approved expansion rows.
Every canonical derived element must use DEDUCTIVE_PRIMARY and cite inference records.
INDUCTIVE_AUXILIARY may propose candidates but cannot make a canonical element without Human Gate approval.
Every eligible closure node, clickable, message, async behavior, failure recovery, overlay closure, and handoff surface must map to a canonical element or blocked gap.
A page or flow name alone does not authorize hidden child pages or lower-level surfaces.
Missing input must have an acquisition path or a product gap route.
Product expansion gaps block downstream consumption until resolved by Human Gate.
Pattern, layout, and compiler workpacks cannot invent elements absent from this element universe or a resolved gap decision.
forbidden_behaviors: treat inventory rows as stronger authority than source language
bundle multiple semantic elements into one inventory row
adopt inductive candidates as canonical without Human Gate approval
consume REQUEST_CLARIFICATION, REJECT_CONFLICT, ROUTE_PRODUCT_GAP, open gap, rejected gap, superseded gap, structural review, or blocked derived rows as canonical elements
complete missing child pages by convention without structural completion review
create new product capability, integration, data scope, role, permission, workflow, or page family without a resolved product expansion gap
let downstream pattern or layout artifacts reference elements not present in the canonical element universe
write repository implementation code during this spec workpack
